title: ID Fresh Food is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: ID Fresh Food is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, ID Fresh Food in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!
